## Release — Blackhole v0.11.0

### ✨ What's new in v0.11.0

Minor release: **the drift-proof toolchain** (ADR-007, all 6 steps). An architectural
retrospective of the v0.9–v0.10 campaign traced ~80% of defect effort to two accidental
patterns — facts restated at consumption sites, and accretion surfaces without extension
seams. This release re-seats the toolchain so both classes are structurally detected at CI.
Decision record: `documentation/decisions/ADR-007-drift-proof-toolchain-reseating.md`
(adversarially evaluated by a 3-critic panel; rejected alternatives documented with evidence).

#### Verification architecture

- **`verify.ts` decomposed** — the 979-LOC / 24-check monolith (the repo's most-fixed file) is now a ~50-LOC glob-discovery runner over `scripts/checks/{domain}.check.ts`, with domains matching the existing test taxonomy 1:1 (core, build, checkpoint, design-track, companion-docs, single-writer). A new invariant = a new auto-discovered check file — **no central registry**, zero modification of existing checks. Behavior byte-identical through the migration.
- **Facts declared once, verified two-sidedly** — the agent roster, phase list, rules, and target set are declared in `build.ts` § facts; verify performs an **independent filesystem scan** and compares scan against declaration (two separately-fallible sources — a counting bug cannot silently propagate). `ground-truth.md`'s hand-maintained counter tables are retired.
- **Doc tables checked, never generated** — README/AGENTS.md stay fully hand-authored; new checks diff their roster tables against the declaration and fail CI printing the exact expected rows. No generation-in-place, no clobber risk.
- **Link integrity (`V-LINK-01`)** — markdown cross-references among `src/**.md` and ADR links are resolved and verified; dead links fail CI.
- **Section-budget content-gate (`V-CONTENTGATE-01`)** — `orchestrator.md`'s modal sections are budget-capped (existing sections grandfathered, new/grown sections ≤50 LOC) with fence-aware section parsing — governance instead of fragmenting the agent's hot-path file.

#### Build pipeline

- **Tracked ⇒ built by default** — plain `bun run build` now produces every git-tracked target; the `--gemini`/`--all` opt-in flags are deprecated no-op aliases (removed next release). The cleanDir full-regeneration invariant is untouched (no cache), keeping the dirty-diff check trustworthy.
- **One shared FS library** — `scripts/lib/fs.ts` is now the only tree-walker and temp-fixture kit; the three independently hand-rolled walkers (each of which failed on the first-ever `src/references/` subdirectory) are gone.

#### Architecture docs

- **Post-campaign retrospective** — full 8-phase x-rearchitect report with a 14-metric dashboard at `documentation/architecture/retrospective-blackhole.md` (headline deltas: unguarded fact copies 56%→0%, component-add sites 7→1, cognitive load −38% LOC).
- **ADR ledger current** — ADR-004/005/006 flipped to Accepted (shipped in v0.8–v0.10); ADR-007 recorded, implemented, and Accepted in the same release.

### Verification

`bun test`: 366/366 pass. `bun run verify`: 26/26 checks pass.
